title: Indulgent American Pork Dumplings
description: A shaggy, cultured American twist on dumplings featuring juicy minced pork and a plant-friendly wrapper, served with a zesty dipping sauce.
instructions: In a bowl, combine minced pork, salt, soy sauce, ginger, green onion, black pepper, and cilantro to form the filling.
In a separate bowl, whisk flour and water until a smooth dough forms, then let rest 10 minutes.
Divide dough into 8 equal portions, roll each into a thin circle about 6 cm in diameter.
Place a tablespoon of filling in the center of each wrapper.
Fold the wrapper over and pinch the edges to seal, forming half-moon shapes.
Heat a skillet over medium-high, add vegetable oil, and pan-fry the dumplings until the base is golden brown.
Transfer dumplings to a steamer basket lined with parchment, then steam for 6 minutes.
Return to skillet, drizzle sesame oil if using, and stir-fry for 2 minutes to crisp the tops.
Serve dumplings hot with a small bowl of dipping sauce made from extra soy sauce, rice vinegar, and chili oil.
